title: Add post-deployment Keystone API health check
summary: Addresses gndrmnn review #2 feedback by deleting the tautological requeue_intervals_test.go that only asserted compile-time constants equal their literal declarations. Adds a review pattern to catch this anti-pattern in future reviews. Updates tracking metadata.

tests_checklist.item: Deleted test was tautological (no meaningful coverage lost)

security_checklist.item: No security implications in this change

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible
